description: Enforcement schema for iteration 2 — mechanical validation and state contracts

artifact-exists.description: Artifact file must exist and be readable

artifact-schema.description: Artifact must match JSON schema (if .schema suffix)

process-invariant.description: Process execution must maintain invariants (determinism, idempotency, atomicity)

state-transition.description: State machine transitions must be legal (init→pending→claimed→executing→validated→complete)

concurrent-safety.description: Concurrent execution must be race-condition free (file locks, atomic writes, CAS)
